seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Trat & Koh Chang 2026 — Budget to Luxury
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Trat and Koh Chang for every budget. From Lonely Beach bungalows to Koh Chang luxury resorts and Koh Kood hideaways. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Accommodation in Trat province ranges from budget bungalows on Lonely Beach to luxury pool-villa resorts overlooking the Gulf of Thailand. Most visitors stay on Koh Chang — the west coast beaches have the widest selection. Trat Town has a handful of characterful boutique hotels perfect for a night before catching the ferry. The outer islands of Koh Kood and Koh Mak offer intimate resorts that feel genuinely remote. Here are 12 real properties across all budgets and locations.

hotels.name: Trat 101 Hotel
hotels.description: A boutique hotel in the heart of Trat's old town on Thana Charoen Road, decorated with oriental vintage furniture and featuring original 100+ year-old wooden floors. Walking distance to the nightly food market, historical sites, and small restaurants. The perfect base for exploring Trat Town before heading to the islands. Rooms are clean and atmospheric with air conditioning.
highlights: Located in historic old town with original wooden floors
Walking distance to Trat Night Market and ferry pier transport
Vintage boutique atmosphere at budget prices

hotels.name: Rimklong Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: One of Trat Town's first stylish small hotels, set in a renovated brick and wood shophouse in the old town area. The building's character shines through with exposed brick walls and wooden details. Central location near the river, night market, and local restaurants. A step up from basic transit hotels without luxury prices.
highlights: Renovated historic shophouse with character
Central old town location near night market
Stylish rooms with air conditioning and hot water

hotels.name: Oasis Koh Chang
hotels.description: Budget bungalows set on a hillside above Lonely Beach with a peaceful jungle atmosphere and swimming pool. Choice of fan bungalows (cheapest) or air-conditioned rooms. The restaurant serves good Thai food. Lonely Beach is Koh Chang's backpacker hub with beach bars and the island's best nightlife just a short walk downhill.
highlights: Swimming pool — rare at budget prices on Koh Chang
Jungle hillside setting with peaceful atmosphere
Walking distance to Lonely Beach bars and restaurants

hotels.name: Kacha Resort & Spa Koh Chang
hotels.description: A 4-star resort with direct beach access at White Sand Beach, Koh Chang's most popular stretch of sand. Modern rooms with balconies, swimming pool, spa, and a beachfront restaurant. Guests can easily access water sports, snorkeling, and island tours from the resort's location on the main tourist beach. Good value for a beachfront property.
highlights: Direct access to White Sand Beach
Swimming pool, spa, and on-site restaurant
Water sports and tour booking at reception

hotels.name: KC Grande Resort & Spa
hotels.description: The most popular 5-star resort on Koh Chang, featuring five swimming pools, a private beach section on White Sand Beach, full-service spa, and multiple restaurants. Accommodation ranges from standard deluxe rooms to premium seaside villas. The resort straddles both sides of the road with a modern tower block and beachfront villas. Rated 8.8/10 from over 4,000 reviews.
highlights: Five swimming pools including beachfront infinity pool
Direct access to White Sand Beach with sun loungers
Full-service spa, fitness center, and multiple dining options

hotels.name: Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort
hotels.description: A refined 76-room resort on Klong Prao Beach, Koh Chang's longest and most peaceful beach. Thai-style architecture with teakwood villas set in tropical gardens leading to the beach. Known for exceptional service (9.2/10 from 2,700+ reviews), excellent restaurant, and a romantic atmosphere. The quieter Klong Prao location feels more exclusive than busy White Sand Beach.
highlights: Klong Prao Beach — the longest, most peaceful beach on Koh Chang
Teakwood villas with Thai architectural details
Consistently top-rated for service (9.2/10 average)

hotels.name: Nature Beach Resort
hotels.description: The top beachfront resort on Lonely Beach, recently replacing old log cabins with modern concrete villas right on the sand. One of just four resorts fronting the actual sand of Lonely Beach. Combines the relaxed backpacker-area atmosphere with proper resort comfort. The beach here is less crowded than White Sand Beach and has better swimming.
highlights: Directly on Lonely Beach sand — one of only four beachfront properties
Newly built modern villas replacing old bungalows
Relaxed atmosphere with better swimming than northern beaches

hotels.name: Centara Koh Chang Tropicana Resort
hotels.description: A well-managed Thai chain resort on Klong Prao Beach with two swimming pools, kids' club, spa, and beachfront dining. The Centara brand delivers consistent quality with modern rooms and reliable service. Great for families with children thanks to the kids' facilities and the calm, long beach at Klong Prao. The resort is set in tropical gardens leading to the sand.
highlights: Two swimming pools and dedicated kids' club
Beachfront location on calm Klong Prao Beach
Centara brand reliability with spa and multiple restaurants

hotels.name: Soneva Kiri
hotels.description: One of Thailand's most exclusive luxury resorts, set on a private beach on Koh Kood. Pool villas with private beaches, a chocolate room, ice cream parlor, observatory, and the famous Treepod Dining experience — eating in a bamboo pod hoisted into the treetops with food delivered by zipline. The ultimate splurge in the Trat archipelago. Reached by private charter flight from Bangkok.
highlights: Treepod Dining — eat in a bamboo pod served by zipline-riding waiters
Private beach pool villas on pristine Koh Kood
Private charter flight from Bangkok included

hotels.name: Hideout Koh Kood
hotels.description: A comfortable mid-range resort on Koh Kood with modern bungalows set among tropical gardens near the beach. One of the better-value options on the island with air-conditioned rooms, restaurant, and organized snorkeling and kayaking trips. The island's quiet, unspoiled atmosphere makes even a mid-range property feel exclusive.
highlights: Comfortable bungalows on Thailand's most unspoiled large island
On-site restaurant and organized water activities
Peaceful atmosphere far from Koh Chang crowds

hotels.name: Koh Mak Resort
hotels.description: A longstanding resort on Koh Mak's best beach, Ao Suan Yai, with simple but comfortable bungalows right on the sand. The resort provides bicycles for island exploration and can arrange snorkeling trips and kayak rentals. The west-facing beach delivers stunning sunsets every evening. Perfect for travelers who want a quiet island escape without Koh Kood's premium prices.
highlights: Beachfront bungalows on Ao Suan Yai — Koh Mak's best sunset beach
Free or cheap bicycle rental for island exploration
Snorkeling trips and kayaks arranged by the resort

hotels.name: The SYLVAN Koh Chang
hotels.description: A modern luxury boutique resort on Klong Prao Beach with contemporary design, infinity pool overlooking the sea, and an acclaimed restaurant. The SYLVAN represents the new wave of upscale properties on Koh Chang — stylish, service-focused, and designed for travelers who want luxury without the mega-resort experience. Smaller and more intimate than KC Grande or Santhiya.
highlights: Contemporary design with infinity pool overlooking the Gulf
Boutique scale — more intimate than large chain resorts
Acclaimed restaurant with Thai and international cuisine
